name: Pork with Kumquats
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Lean pork, well trimmed of all visible fat and cut into 1-inch cubes
6 Whole kumquats, seeds removed and finely chopped
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat an empty wok for a minute or two. Add 1 tablespoon of peanut oil and heat until the oil is hot but not smoking.
2. Add pork and stir-fry until no longer pink, about 3 minutes.
3. Add the remaining tablespoon of peanut oil to the wok along with onions. Stir-fry for 2 minutes, or until onions are softened but not browned.
4. Meanwhile, combine water, soy sauce, and cornstarch in a separate bowl; set aside.
5. Add chopped kumquats to onions, return pork to the wok, and stir in lemon juice and honey. Stir in the soy sauce mixture and cook over high heat until pork is completely done and sauce is thickened and bubbly, about 3 minutes.
6. Serve immediately over rice.
